summary: Tested SportLyo Prestations Externes section renaming from 'Partenaires'. All 7 features verified working: Hub label change, section header, 5 widget cards, widget filtering, add prestataire button text, add dialog, and category dropdown with organized groups.

hub_label_prestations_externes.evidence: Screenshot shows hub card with label 'PRESTATIONS EXTERNES' and description 'Prestataires evenementiels'

section_header_prestations_externes.evidence: h2 element shows 'PRESTATIONS EXTERNES' with 'Retour au tableau de bord' back button

five_widget_cards.description: 5 widget cards displayed (Infrastructures, Securite & Balisage, Course & Technique, Services & Logistique, Autres Services)
five_widget_cards.evidence: All 5 widgets found with data-testid attributes: widget-infrastructures, widget-securite, widget-course, widget-logistique, widget-autres

widget_click_filtering.description: Widget cards are clickable and filter the list by category group
widget_click_filtering.evidence: Clicking Infrastructures widget shows 'FILTRE ACTIF: INFRASTRUCTURES' tag with X button to clear

add_button_text_prestataire.description: Button says 'AJOUTER UN PRESTATAIRE' not 'Ajouter un partenaire'
add_button_text_prestataire.evidence: Button text is 'Ajouter un prestataire' with data-testid='add-partner-btn'

add_dialog_category_dropdown_groups.description: Adding a prestataire dialog - category dropdown organized by groups
add_dialog_category_dropdown_groups.evidence: Screenshot shows dropdown with all 5 group headers (COURSE & TECHNIQUE, SERVICES & LOGISTIQUE, AUTRES SERVICES visible, INFRASTRUCTURES and SECURITE & BALISAGE when scrolled up) with their respective subcategories

active_filter_tag_with_x_clear.description: Active filter tag appears when clicking a widget and can be cleared with X
active_filter_tag_with_x_clear.evidence: Filter tag shows 'FILTRE ACTIF:' followed by category name with X button to clear; clicking widget again also clears filter

seed_data_creation: None - used existing prestataires (ChronoPlus Lyon, Le Kiosque du Sport)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prestations Externes section fully working. PartnersSection.js has WIDGET_CATEGORIES array defining 5 groups with subcategories. Widget filtering uses local state 'activeWidget'. Existing prestataires with old categories (Chronometreur, Buvette) appear in 'Autres Services' group as fallback. All data-testids present: widget-infrastructures, widget-securite, widget-course, widget-logistique, widget-autres, add-partner-btn, partner-category-select, partner-company-input, etc.
